basic_details.job_title: IIT Madras Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras) Project Associate Notification 2026 has been released on the official website for the recruitment of 3 Project Associate posts. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Madras Project Associate Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E/B.Tech, M.Sc (Physics), Master’s degree in Science (Physics), Engineering, Mechatronics or related subjects
qualification.details: B.E / B.Tech / M.Sc (Physics) / Master’s degree in Science (Physics) / Engineering / Other closely related subjects (such as Mechatronics)

selection_process: Shortlisting based on online application Written Test Skill Test Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Madras Project Associate Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 11-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Madras to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Madras Project Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the IIT Madras Project Associate positions is 11 May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate post at IIT Madras?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the Project Associate post at IIT Madras as per the latest notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate role?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a B.E/B.Tech, M.Sc (Physics), or a Master’s degree in Science (Physics), Engineering, Mechatronics, or closely related subjects.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Project Associate role will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 25,000/- to Rs. 30,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIT Madras Project Associate recruitment is strictly online through the official website.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the Project Associate posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Project Associate positions.

faq.question: Q7. What are the selection stages for the Project Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes shortlisting based on the online application, followed by a Written Test, Skill Test, Interview, and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for the Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The Project Associate position at IIT Madras is offered on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, which will contain all detailed information.

faq.question: Q10. Can I apply offline for the Project Associate position?
faq.answer: No, applications for the Project Associate positions at IIT Madras must be submitted online only. Offline applications will not be considered.
